titleStmt.title: SII 9.507: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 507. (A.R. No. 87 of 1912.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE CHAUDESVARI TEMPLE AT CHOLASAMUDRAM, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is incomplete and dated Śaka 1439, Īśvara, Mārgaśira, ba. 3, corresponding to A.D. 1517 December 1 Tuesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya, king of Karṇāṭaka. It mentions his queen Tirumalāmbikā and records that Rāyasada Koṇḍamarasayya, son of Mantri Timmarasa and grandson of Śrīpatyāchārya, of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Āśvalāyna-sūtra and Ṛik-śākhā, made some gift for the service of the goddess Chauḍēśvari in Chōḷasamudra in order that the king may be blessed with children. Koṇḍamarasayya is stated to have been an expert in reading various scripts. His grandfather is described as a very learned man and observer of the four religious orders, Brahmacharya, Gṛihastha, Vānaprastha and Yati, as the ornament of the Udayagiri-Kannaḍiga-kula and as the chief of Podaṭūru in the Draviḍa-ḍēśa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1439 neya
tadupari varttamāna Īśvarasaṁvatsarada mārgaśira ba 2 lū śrīmatu sadharmmacāritraṁ
svāmikāryyaduraṁdhara tauḷavaṁśābdicaṁda . Īśvarēṁdravaraputraṁ Atulabhujapalaparākramaṁ
cēracōḷapāṁḍyādivairibhūbhujamadabhaṁjanaṁ dēvabrā(ṁ)hmaṇasīmājīrṇnōdhārakaṁ
śaraṇāgatarakṣakaṁ Ājñāpālakaṁ AiśvaryyaAnēkaguṇasaṁpannanappa narasabhūpālakomāra
kaṁ Anēkaṣōḍaśamahādānādirūḍhaṁ snānadānavrataniyamātmakaṁ Aghaṭitamahāpu(ṁ)ṇya kṣē
trādidarśanaṁ samastavēdaśāstrapurāṇāgamādipravarttakaṁ śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa vīranarasiṁharāyasahōdaraṁ sākṣāt pratyakṣakṛṣṇāvatāraṁ Adhar(ṁ)
masaṁhārakaṁ dhar(ṁ)mmapratipālanaṁ sakalalōkarakṣakaṁ Atibahaḷacaturaṁgabalasa
mōpētaṁ gajāśvapatisarvvasvāpahārakaṁ Amarēṁdrasamānasaṁpatkaraṁ girivanajaladu
rgādisamastadurggagarvamadabhaṁjanaṁ hariścaṁdrādicakravarttisamōpētasatyakīrttipra
tāpaṁ Anēkanūtanāgrahārapālakaṁ ĀścaryyaApratimasāhasabhujabala
parākramaṁ kalpāṁtakīrtiyuktaṁ catuḥsamudrādhīśvaraṁ krutayugāṁ
śapravartaka śrītirumalāṁbikālakṣmīsamōpēta śrīkarnāṭakasiṁhā
sanārūḍha śrīkṛṣṇarāyamahārāyara sāṁbrājyadalu Anēkava
stusamruddhamappa draviḍadēśadalli mahāgrahāravappa podaṭūra grāmā
dhipaṁ vēdaśāstrapāraṁgataṁ brahmacaryyavānaprastagruhasthayatyā
dyāśramavratasthaṁ Āśvalāyanasūtrō(ṁ)nnataṁ bhāradvājagōtrōdbha
vaṁ rukuśākhādhyāyakaṁ Udayagirikaṁnaḍigakulatilakaṁ viprāgra
ga(ṁ)ṇyaṁ satkulaprasūtaṁ śrīpatyācāryyaṁ tatkumārakaroḷu śi
vapūjādhuraṁdhara sarvaguṇasaṁpaṁnanappa tiṁmarsamaṁtrisaṁ
gamāṁbikāgarbhasvudhākaraṁ svakulōddhārakaṁ baṁdhujanaciṁ
tāmaṇisamaṁ yācakajanakalpabhūjaṁ dēvabrā(ṁ)hmaṇasī
māpālakaṁ svāmikāryyahatavaṁtaṁ ghanegiri Udayādri pra
mukhādi Anēkadurgaprajārakṣakaṁ siṁhādriśrīkūrmaja
yastaṁbhakāryanirvāhakaṁ chapa(ṁ)nnadēśacitralipilēkhakō
vidaṁ mahāpradhānaṁ yugāṁtakīrtiyuktanapa rāyasta koṁḍama
rasayyanavarū ta(ṁ)mma svāmi kruṣṇarāyamahārāyarige saṁtā
nābhiUraddhiyāgabēkeṁdu coḷasamudrada cauḍēśvaridēvaThis record abruptly stops here.
Digital edition of SII 9.507 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
